title: Lumia Scent Frosted Glass Skincare Serum Ad Poster
sourceTitle: Lumia Scent Frosted Glass Skincare Serum Ad Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Eco-friendly minimalist skincare product photograph built around frosted glass skincare serum bottle with clean minimalist label and translucent botanical liquid, LUMIA SCENT, and serene nature scene with flowing clear water, green leaves, warm sunlight beams, smooth river stones, and soft pastel air. Subject: frosted glass skincare serum bottle with clean minimalist label and translucent botanical liquid is the centered hero skincare bottle with readable label text "LUMIA SCENT", frosted glass silhouette, clean cap, and premium cosmetic material detail. Scene: serene nature scene with flowing clear water, green leaves, warm sunlight beams, smooth river stones, and soft pastel air surrounds the bottle as a calm sustainability-focused nature set with water, leaves, soft stones, and uncluttered botanical depth. Composition: Fixed vertical high-end product-photography crop: bottle slightly forward as hero, nature elements framing the sides, water surface or river-stone base below, warm beams crossing behind, clean label visibility, and generous breathing room. Signature Elements: flowing water, green leaves, dew highlights, warm sunlight beams, and clean mist surrounding the hero bottle provides the source-specific water-and-leaf hero detail while preserving the calm clean eco-skincare advertisement style. Style: High-end eco skincare product photography with clean minimalist aesthetic, sustainability-focused branding, soft pastel polish, calm pure atmosphere, and realistic cosmetic packaging detail. Color Palette: Fixed soft pastel skincare palette: frosted white glass, pale botanical green, clear water blue, warm sunlight gold, soft cream, smooth stone neutrals, and gentle natural highlights. Lighting: Warm natural sunlight beams with soft diffusion, clean rim highlights on frosted glass, dew sparkle on leaves, and readable product label detail. Camera: Premium product-photography lens language with shallow depth of field, crisp front label, clean reflection or water texture, and softly blurred botanical background. Materials: Frosted glass, translucent botanical liquid, water ripples, dew drops, fresh leaves, smooth stones, and soft mist remain tactile and realistic. Typography: Use "LUMIA SCENT" as the readable label text and SOFT POWER as the short campaign line if a secondary line appears; keep all text minimal and intentional. Restrictions: Keep one coherent skincare bottle, readable minimal label, clean natural setting, realistic water and leaf detail, premium product hierarchy, and calm pure commercial atmosphere.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Eco-friendly minimalist skincare product photograph built around frosted glass skincare essence bottle with minimalist pale green label and clean pump cap, AURORA SKIN, and fresh streamside moss and fern setting with soft water movement, green leaves, dew, and warm sunlight beams. Subject: frosted glass skincare essence bottle with minimalist pale green label and clean pump cap is the centered hero skincare bottle with readable label text "AURORA SKIN", frosted glass silhouette, clean cap, and premium cosmetic material detail. Scene: fresh streamside moss and fern setting with soft water movement, green leaves, dew, and warm sunlight beams surrounds the bottle as a calm sustainability-focused nature set with water, leaves, soft stones, and uncluttered botanical depth. Composition: Fixed vertical high-end product-photography crop: bottle slightly forward as hero, nature elements framing the sides, water surface or river-stone base below, warm beams crossing behind, clean label visibility, and generous breathing room. Signature Elements: clear water ribbon curling around the frosted bottle, dew drops on leaves, and soft sunbeams crossing the label provides the source-specific water-and-leaf hero detail while preserving the calm clean eco-skincare advertisement style. Style: High-end eco skincare product photography with clean minimalist aesthetic, sustainability-focused branding, soft pastel polish, calm pure atmosphere, and realistic cosmetic packaging detail. Color Palette: Fixed soft pastel skincare palette: frosted white glass, pale botanical green, clear water blue, warm sunlight gold, soft cream, smooth stone neutrals, and gentle natural highlights. Lighting: Warm natural sunlight beams with soft diffusion, clean rim highlights on frosted glass, dew sparkle on leaves, and readable product label detail. Camera: Premium product-photography lens language with shallow depth of field, crisp front label, clean reflection or water texture, and softly blurred botanical background. Materials: Frosted glass, translucent botanical liquid, water ripples, dew drops, fresh leaves, smooth stones, and soft mist remain tactile and realistic. Typography: Use "AURORA SKIN" as the readable label text and PURE MORNING as the short campaign line if a secondary line appears; keep all text minimal and intentional. Restrictions: Keep one coherent skincare bottle, readable minimal label, clean natural setting, realistic water and leaf detail, premium product hierarchy, and calm pure commercial atmosphere.

Theme: Eco-friendly minimalist skincare product photograph built around frosted glass skincare essence bottle with minimalist pale green label and clean pump cap, AURORA SKIN, and fresh streamside moss and fern setting with soft water movement, green leaves, dew, and warm sunlight beams. Subject: frosted glass skincare essence bottle with minimalist pale green label and clean pump cap is the centered hero skincare bottle with readable label text "AURORA SKIN", frosted glass silhouette, clean cap, and premium cosmetic material detail. Scene: fresh streamside moss and fern setting with soft water movement, green leaves, dew, and warm sunlight beams surrounds the bottle as a calm sustainability-focused nature set with water, leaves, soft stones, and uncluttered botanical depth. Composition: Fixed vertical high-end product-photography crop: bottle slightly forward as hero, nature elements framing the sides, water surface or river-stone base below, warm beams crossing behind, clean label visibility, and generous breathing room. Signature Elements: clear water ribbon curling around the frosted bottle, dew drops on leaves, and soft sunbeams crossing the label provides the source-specific water-and-leaf hero detail while preserving the calm clean eco-skincare advertisement style. Style: High-end eco skincare product photography with clean minimalist aesthetic, sustainability-focused branding, soft pastel polish, calm pure atmosphere, and realistic cosmetic packaging detail. Color Palette: Fixed soft pastel skincare palette: frosted white glass, pale botanical green, clear water blue, warm sunlight gold, soft cream, smooth stone neutrals, and gentle natural highlights. Lighting: Warm natural sunlight beams with soft diffusion, clean rim highlights on frosted glass, dew sparkle on leaves, and readable product label detail. Camera: Premium product-photography lens language with shallow depth of field, crisp front label, clean reflection or water texture, and softly blurred botanical background. Materials: Frosted glass, translucent botanical liquid, water ripples, dew drops, fresh leaves, smooth stones, and soft mist remain tactile and realistic. Typography: Use "AURORA SKIN" as the readable label text and PURE MORNING as the short campaign line if a secondary line appears; keep all text minimal and intentional. Restrictions: Keep one coherent skincare bottle, readable minimal label, clean natural setting, realistic water and leaf detail, premium product hierarchy, and calm pure commercial atmosphere.

imagePrompts.title: Lumia Scent Frosted Glass Skincare Serum Ad Poster Pure Morning
